[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0111101 5
1 0101000 2
2 0101000 2
3 0000110 2
4 1011111 6
5 1011000 3
6 0010011 3
7 0110010 3

01 10 0101110 4
12 21 1011001 4
23 32 0000111 3
34 43 1001011 4
45 54 0100001 2
56 65 0100111 4
67 76 0111101 5 match 0
70 07 0000000 a

02 20 1110111 6
13 31 1011110 5
24 42 1001100 3
35 53 1101010 4
46 64 0000110 2 match 3
57 75 0011010 3
60 06 0111101 5 match 0
71 17 0101110 4

03 30 1110000 3
14 41 0010101 3
25 52 1101101 5
36 63 1001101 4
47 74 0111011 5
50 05 0011010 3
61 16 0010011 3 match 6
72 27 1110111 6

04 40 0111011 5
15 51 0110100 3
26 62 1001010 3
37 73 1110000 3
